title: Aio's SCR (Super Cool Recipes)
description: This Datapack adds many recipes to items that usually wouldn't have one
body:
# This datapack adds a ton of fun recipes
this datapack is to be used with create, cobblemon, create enchantment industry, create dragons plus, and some optional ones like mega showdown and cobblemon raid dens :)

### A few recipes like
- Exp Candy from Mixing
- All the Create stones
- and scoria and scorchia recipes
